instructions: This repository is a Claude Code dedicated test-design workflow project.
Use docs/local-test-design-pipeline.md as the primary execution policy for PRD/TRD/API-document based testing requests.
Default to lightweight mode and upgrade only when the documented conditions are met.
Write generated test-design artifacts under test-design/ using the documented directory layout.
Do not invent missing business rules; list pending questions instead.
Do not run tc-scripting or tc-running by default; use them only for full mode or explicit automation/execution requests.
Keep manual review gates visible in generated outputs.
